name: Resin Stackable Adirondack Chair Cinnamon - Room Essentials™
description:
Elevate your outdoor seating space with this Stackable Adirondack Chair from Room Essentials™. Supported by a resin frame, this Adirondack chair features a long backrest for maximum comfort. Featuring a stackable design for storage in compact spaces, this wide-arm chair has two holders for extra convenience. Plus, it's resistant to weather and rust, making it ideal for outdoor use.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
